title: I created an AI tool to detect SMC OB.
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
Hi everyone,

I've been trading SMC for some time now, but I've always found it tedious to manually identify valid order blocks and BOS across multiple time frames. So I decided to create a small web application to automate the process. Basically, you upload a screenshot of a chart, and the AI highlights overpricing, identifies the market trend, and shows you potential stop loss and take profit zones. It's still in development, but it's finally online on Vercel. I'm looking for about ten people to test it and give me their honest opinion.

comments.author: Hot_Style5572
comments.body:
Assuming that it's supposed to reflect how humans would mark the levels, right? Then what happens when a chart with no clear levels is uploaded?

As a side note, we've built an algorithm to assign a score reflecting how similar two charts are. I wonder if the result from your software and ours would align (meaning if two charts where your tool finds OBs would correspond to a high similarity score in ours). Down to try?
